summary: Iteration 24 - Campaign Delete Button Bug Fix Testing Complete. The delete button fix (changing action type from 'delete-confirmed' to 'delete') is working correctly. All tested features pass: delete functionality, filters, campaign detail modal, and the Spanish campaign exists with 3 images.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_DELETE_ME_CAMPAIGN for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete button bug is fixed. Campaign CRUD operations all working via API and UI.

delete_button_fix.notes: Bug fixed - clicking trash icon now shows confirm dialog and successfully deletes campaign. Count updated from 17 to 16 after deletion.

my_truck_brokers_campaign.notes: Campaign exists with 3 images as expected

campaign_detail_modal.notes: Modal opens correctly when clicking chevron/detail button. Shows campaign info, KPIs, cost per lead, schedule, and message flow.

filters.notes: All filter buttons work correctly (7+7+2=16 verified)

bug_fix_verification.issue: Delete button was not working (clicking had no effect)
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Action type mismatch - button sent 'delete-confirmed' but handleAction only handled 'delete'
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed button action from 'delete-confirmed' to 'delete' in CampaignCard component (line 596-604)
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Created test campaign, clicked delete button, confirmed dialog appeared, campaign was deleted
bug_fix_verification.result: FIX VERIFIED - Delete button now works correctly
